toggle-side-panel.description: Toggle the browser agent side panel

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.openai.com https://api.anthropic.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://api.mistral.ai https://api.moonshot.ai; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:;

description: A browser agent for interacting with web content.
name: Browser Agent
